# Applio

> Applio is a free, AI-powered career copilot for job seekers and professionals. It builds ATS-optimized resumes that pass automated applicant-tracking filters, tailors them to any job, and then supports the whole career arc — landing the job, ramping in a new role, growing, and moving to the next one. All AI is grounded in the user's real experience and never fabricates facts, numbers, or skills.

## What Applio does

Get the job:
- Resume builder: 16 professional, fully customizable templates (fonts, colors, spacing, section order), including Harvard, Stanford, and Jake's Resume styles. Import an existing PDF/DOCX and Applio parses it into editable sections. Live preview matches the exported PDF exactly.
- AI Tailoring: paste any job description and Applio rewrites your bullets and summary to match the role — grounded only in your real experience.
- ATS Score: scores your resume against a job description and lists concrete fixes and missing keywords.
- AI Resume Analysis: strengths, weaknesses, and the highest-impact changes.
- Cover Letter Generator: a tailored, one-page cover letter for a specific role and company.
- AI Interview Prep: role-specific practice questions plus AI feedback on your answers, using the STAR method.
- Application Autopilot: paste a job description and get a full application packet — fit verdict, tailored resume, cover letter, and the keywords you're missing.
- Job Tracker: save jobs (with the posting), track status, and get follow-up nudges.
- Career Coach: an AI assistant that knows your resume and helps with rewrites, tailoring, interviews, job strategy, and cover letters.
- One-click export to PDF, HTML, or TXT — no watermark on any plan.

Ramp, grow, and get paid (the career copilot):
- Skill Gap Coach: compares your resume against a target role — or a specific job posting you paste or pick from your tracker — and shows the highest-impact skills that role requires that your resume is missing, plus the ones you already have. You can add the skills you genuinely have to your resume in one click.
- Win Journal: log accomplishments as they happen (one line each). A weekly email reminder keeps the habit going. Each win can be AI-polished into a resume-ready bullet.
- Brag Doc generator: compiles your logged wins into a printable one-page "brag doc," grouped by month, for performance reviews, promotion cases, and raise conversations. One click polishes the whole doc into sharp resume bullets.
- First 90 Days plan: a 30/60/90-day onboarding checklist for a new role (learn, contribute, deliver), a people-to-meet map, and questions to ask your manager.

## Free tools (no sign-up)
- Free ATS Resume Checker (https://appliohq.com/ats-checker): paste a resume and job description for an instant ATS score, matched and missing keywords, and concrete fixes.

## Pricing
- Free forever: full resume builder, all 16 templates, job tracker, AI Interview Prep, Skill Gap Coach, Win Journal, Brag Doc, and 10 PDF downloads — no credit card required.
- Premium ($9.99/month): everything in Free plus unlimited downloads and all AI writing features (AI Improve, Tailor to Job, ATS Check, Resume Analysis, Application Autopilot, Cover Letters, Career Coach).
- Lifetime ($39.99 one-time): all Premium features, paid once and used forever.

## Key facts
- Positioning: Applio is more than a resume builder — it is an AI career copilot that supports the entire career arc (land → ramp → grow → move), used repeatedly over a career rather than only during a job search.
- What ATS means: an Applicant Tracking System collects, parses, and ranks resumes before a recruiter reviews them. It does not auto-reject applications (most are still reviewed by a person), but resumes that miss a job's keywords or use formatting the software can't parse rank lower and are less likely to be seen. Applio scores a resume against the ATS rubric and lists specific fixes.
- Myth check: the widely repeated "75% of resumes are auto-rejected by ATS" claim is not supported by evidence; it traces to a 2012 sales pitch from a company that shut down in 2013. Applio's guidance reflects how ATS actually works.
- Grounding: Applio's AI never invents titles, employers, numbers, skills, or achievements. Missing skills are framed as "verify you have it and add it, or learn it," never "claim it."
- Free to start; no credit card required.
- Privacy: passwords hashed (PBKDF2-SHA256); resume data encrypted in transit and at rest; payments handled by Stripe.
